Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotTableCell

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotTableCell
public class PotTableCell extends Object
Represents a single cell within a PotTable, providing a fluent API for styling and content manipulation.

This class wraps an Apache POI XSLFTableCell and offers a higher-level, chainable interface for common table cell operations such as setting text, applying fonts, colors, borders, alignment, and padding. All style modifications are applied directly to the underlying POI object. Methods that return this enable method chaining for convenient configuration.

Usage Example


 PotTableCell cell = table.cell(0, 0);
 cell.setText("Header")
     .fill(PotColor.BLUE)
     .fontColor(PotColor.WHITE)
     .bold()
     .align(PotAlignment.CENTER)
     .verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment.MIDDLE);
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotTableCell
    align(PotAlignment alignment)
    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the cell.
    PotTableCell
    appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
    Appends text to the end of the cell's current content.
    PotTableCell
    bold()
    Applies bold styling to all text runs within the cell.

    Enables or disables bold styling for all text runs within the cell.
    PotTableCell

    Applies the same border style to all four sides of the cell.

    Applies a border style to the bottom edge of the cell.

  • Method Details

    • getRow

      public int getRow()
      Returns the zero-based row index of this cell within its table.
      Returns:
      the zero-based row index

    • getCol

      public int getCol()
      Returns the zero-based column index of this cell within its table.
      Returns:
      the zero-based column index

    • getTable

      public PotTable getTable()
      Returns the parent table that contains this cell.
      Returns:
      the parent PotTable

    • setText

      public PotTableCell setText(String text)
      Sets the plain text content of the cell, replacing any existing text.

      If the provided text is null, the cell's text is set to an empty string.

      Parameters:
      text - the new text content for the cell; may be null
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the current plain text content of the cell.
      Returns:
      the cell's text content; may be an empty string but never null

    • appendText

      public PotTableCell appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
      Appends text to the end of the cell's current content.

      If the provided text is null, this method has no effect. The newLine parameter controls whether the appended text starts on a new line (paragraph).

      Parameters:
      text - the text to append; may be null
      newLine - true to start the appended text on a new line, false to continue on the same line
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • clearText

      public PotTableCell clearText()
      Removes all text content from the cell.
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fontFamily

      public PotTableCell fontFamily(String family)
      Sets the font family for all text runs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      family - the font family name (e.g., "Arial"); null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fontSize

      public PotTableCell fontSize(double size)
      Sets the font size for all text runs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      size - the font size in points
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fontColor

      public PotTableCell fontColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the font color for all text runs within the cell using a PotColor.
      Parameters:
      color - the desired font color; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fontColor

      public PotTableCell fontColor(Color color)
      Sets the font color for all text runs within the cell using a standard AWT Color.
      Parameters:
      color - the desired AWT font color; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • bold

      public PotTableCell bold()
      Applies bold styling to all text runs within the cell.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to bold(true).

      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining
      See Also:
      • bold(boolean)

    • bold

      public PotTableCell bold(boolean bold)
      Enables or disables bold styling for all text runs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      bold - true to apply bold styling, false to remove it
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • italic

      public PotTableCell italic()
      Applies italic styling to all text runs within the cell.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to italic(true).

      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining
      See Also:
      • italic(boolean)

    • italic

      public PotTableCell italic(boolean italic)
      Enables or disables italic styling for all text runs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      italic - true to apply italic styling, false to remove it
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • underline

      public PotTableCell underline(boolean underline)
      Enables or disables underline styling for all text runs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      underline - true to apply underline styling, false to remove it
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • font

      public PotTableCell font(PotFont font)
      Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs within the cell.

      Only the non-null and applicable properties of the provided font are applied. This includes font family, size, color, bold, italic, and underline styles.

      Parameters:
      font - the font specification containing the properties to apply; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • align

      public PotTableCell align(PotAlignment alignment)
      Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within the cell.
      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired horizontal alignment; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • verticalAlign

      public PotTableCell verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment alignment)
      Sets the vertical alignment of text within the cell.
      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired vertical alignment; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotTableCell fill(PotColor color)
      Sets the background fill color of the cell using a PotColor.

      If the provided color is null, the fill is effectively removed (set to transparent).

      Parameters:
      color - the desired fill color; null removes the fill
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotTableCell fill(Color color)
      Sets the background fill color of the cell using a standard AWT Color.
      Parameters:
      color - the desired AWT fill color; may be null for no fill
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • noFill

      public PotTableCell noFill()
      Removes the background fill from the cell, making it transparent.
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • getFillColor

      public PotColor getFillColor()
      Returns the current background fill color of the cell as a PotColor.
      Returns:
      the fill color, or null if the cell has no fill

    • border

      public PotTableCell border(PotBorder border)
      Applies the same border style to all four sides of the cell.

      If the provided border is null, or its color is null, or its width is not positive, the border on all sides is removed (width set to zero).

      Parameters:
      border - the border specification to apply uniformly
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • borderTop

      public PotTableCell borderTop(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border style to the top edge of the cell.

      If the provided border is null, or its color is null, or its width is not positive, the top border is removed (width set to zero).

      Parameters:
      border - the border specification for the top edge
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • borderRight

      public PotTableCell borderRight(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border style to the right edge of the cell.

      If the provided border is null, or its color is null, or its width is not positive, the right border is removed (width set to zero).

      Parameters:
      border - the border specification for the right edge
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • borderBottom

      public PotTableCell borderBottom(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border style to the bottom edge of the cell.

      If the provided border is null, or its color is null, or its width is not positive, the bottom border is removed (width set to zero).

      Parameters:
      border - the border specification for the bottom edge
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • borderLeft

      public PotTableCell borderLeft(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border style to the left edge of the cell.

      If the provided border is null, or its color is null, or its width is not positive, the left border is removed (width set to zero).

      Parameters:
      border - the border specification for the left edge
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • noBorder

      public PotTableCell noBorder()
      Removes all borders from the cell by setting their widths to zero.
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • padding

      public PotTableCell padding(double padding)
      Applies uniform padding to all four sides of the cell's content area.
      Parameters:
      padding - the padding value (in points) to apply to top, right, bottom, and left
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • padding

      public PotTableCell padding(double top, double right, double bottom, double left)
      Sets individual padding values for each side of the cell.
      Parameters:
      top - the top padding in points
      right - the right padding in points
      bottom - the bottom padding in points
      left - the left padding in points
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • isMerged

      public boolean isMerged()
      Indicates whether this cell is part of a merged cell region.

      A cell is considered merged if it is not the top-left cell of a merged region. In such cases, its content and styling are typically controlled by the top-left cell.

      Returns:
      true if this cell is merged (i.e., not the primary cell of a merge), false otherwise

    • getRowSpan

      public int getRowSpan()
      Returns the number of rows spanned by this cell.

      For a non-merged cell, this returns 1. For the top-left cell of a merged region, it returns the total number of rows covered by the merge.

      Returns:
      the row span (always at least 1)

    • getColSpan

      public int getColSpan()
      Returns the number of columns spanned by this cell.

      For a non-merged cell, this returns 1. For the top-left cell of a merged region, it returns the total number of columns covered by the merge. Note: The underlying POI API may not directly expose column span; this implementation returns 1 as a default.

      Returns:
      the column span (always at least 1)

    • textDirection

      public PotTableCell textDirection(PotDirection direction)
      Sets the text direction (writing mode) for the cell.

      This controls whether text flows horizontally (left-to-right or right-to-left) or vertically. If the provided direction is null, the method does nothing and returns immediately.

      Parameters:
      direction - the desired text direction; null values are ignored
      Returns:
      this cell for method chaining

    • getRawCell

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTableCell getRawCell()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI XSLFTableCell object.

      This method provides direct access to the POI object for advanced operations not covered by the wrapper API. Modifications made directly to the returned object will affect this cell.

      Returns:
      the underlying XSLFTableCell

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the cell for debugging purposes.

      The representation includes the cell's row and column indices and a truncated version of its text content (if longer than 20 characters).

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a concise, informative string representation of the cell
